goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'stevenage' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 17:30' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'departure time', and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from stevenage and should go to cambridge
The train should arrive by 17:30 and should leave on wednesday
Make sure you get travel time, departure time, and train ID
